summary: Easy-to-use beauty tools focused on home self-care routines.

products.title: Cooling Face Roller
products.description_preview: Soothing facial massage tool for daily use.
products.body_html: Refresh your skin with a cooling roller that supports a calming routine.

products.title: Electric Brush Cleaner
products.description_preview: Clean and dry makeup brushes quickly.
products.body_html: Keep brushes fresh with fast spinning wash and dry technology.

products.title: Heated Eyelash Curler
products.body_html: Create a natural curl in seconds with a USB rechargeable heated curler.

products.title: Reusable Facial Ice Globes
products.description_preview: Cool and depuff skin during morning skincare routines.
products.body_html: Chilled glass globes help calm skin appearance while adding a spa-like touch to daily self-care.

products.title: Dermaplane Razor Set
products.description_preview: Shape brows and remove peach fuzz with precision.
products.body_html: Protective-cover razors support smoother makeup application and quick touch-ups at home.

products.title: Silicone Face Mask Applicator Brush
products.description_preview: Apply clay and cream masks cleanly without finger mess.
products.body_html: Soft flexible applicator spreads product evenly and rinses clean faster than traditional brushes.

products.title: Latex-Free Makeup Sponge Set
products.description_preview: Blend foundation and concealer for a smooth finish.
products.body_html: Soft multi-shape sponges expand with water to help create seamless everyday makeup looks.

products.title: Precision Eyebrow Trimmer Pen
products.description_preview: Portable facial trimmer for quick brow and upper lip touch-ups.
products.body_html: Compact rechargeable trimmer removes fine hair gently for polished, travel-friendly upkeep.

products.title: Silicone Scalp Massage Brush
products.description_preview: Boost shampoo routines with a gentle scalp scrub.
products.body_html: Flexible silicone bristles help distribute product evenly while supporting a relaxing wash-day routine.

products.title: Folding LED Makeup Mirror
products.description_preview: Bright adjustable mirror for desks, vanities, and travel bags.
products.body_html: Portable LED mirror offers clear lighting and multiple angles for makeup, skincare, and grooming.

pages.Home: Discover beauty tools that make your daily routine simple and relaxing.
pages.About: We curate practical self-care products for beginners and beauty lovers.
pages.FAQ: Q: Are tools safe for sensitive skin? A: Yes, when used as directed.
pages.Shipping Policy: USA delivery takes around 5-8 business days.
pages.Refund Policy: 30-day return support for damaged or incorrect products.
pages.Privacy Policy: We protect your personal information and process orders securely.

hooks: Feel polished without the salon trip.
